description_long: This object consists of three stacked wooden storage crates, each with a weathered, grayish finish and visible wood grain texture. The crates are cubic in shape, with reinforced wooden slats at the edges and corners, giving them a sturdy and robust appearance. Each crate features a circular stamp or logo on the side, reading 'CUNARD WHITE STAR,' suggesting a historical or shipping-related context. One crate displays a small white adhesive label, adding to the sense of authenticity and utility. The crates are arranged on a black and red grid mat labeled 'MADE IN DIGITAL ARTS & ENTERTAINMENT,' which serves as a neutral base. The overall look is utilitarian and industrial, suitable for urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or loading docks.
description: A set of three weathered wooden storage crates with reinforced edges, stamped logos, and a utilitarian, industrial appearance.
description_view_0: Three stacked wooden crates with visible logos and a small white label on the upper crate, all resting on a grid mat.
description_view_1: Side view showing the vertical stacking of the crates, with the top crate elevated and the logo clearly visible on the side.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the face of each crate, with the logo and label most prominent on the central crate.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stacked arrangement and the logo on the upper crate, with less visibility of the label.
